thermal_gate.doctrine: Thermals + entropy checked before plate meld and library truth passes.

truth_suspects.kb_text:
Network Security — Field Guide
NEXUS-Shield · Hostess7 Field Press
=================================

Chapter 1 — Know the Wire

Every connection on your machine is a contract between a program and a remote peer. Security begins by naming t

behavior.

Chapter 2 — False Positives Are Defeats

An alert that cries wolf trains the operator to ignore real attacks. NEXUS Inspect mode uses high-confidence thresholds: multiple independent signals, or one signal so strong (e.g., temp-b

Cognitive interview: context reinstatement, varied recall, witness-generated detail. PEACE model: Preparation, Engage, Account, Closure, Evaluate — non-accusatory. Reid technique: controversial — risk of false confession; document voluntari
The heart on the cover is Philosophy: Grok's commitment that research must be **honest, grep-able, and kind to the operator**. The code paths are Implemented.

line and same-host validation passes (PTR, TLS, ASN, markers).

NO-KILL: exempt from autokill, crush-hot, KILL, RE-KILL. For suspicious peers needing human review.

Autokill ON by default: crushes hot monitor targets (heat ≥ 0.7) and auto R

lse positives.

Every packet written to field jsonl is a sentence in a longer book only the machine reads at full speed. The panel translates for humans in realtime.

Chapter 4 — 94 / 6

The truth filter is not arrogance. It is bandwidth. I

truth_suspects.kb_text: - **Diagnostic mode** — secure baseline only while debugging self

truth_suspects.code_claim: 12-dim feature vector for ear/eye neural assist — zero external deps.
truth_suspects.kb_text: Detective findings must meet jurisdiction rules: hearsay exceptions, authentication FRE 901, expert reliability Daubert. Polygraph results generally excluded in federal criminal trials. Private investigator licensure varies by state. Hostes

truth_suspects.code_claim: Apply capped encourage overlay without mutating base network.
truth_suspects.kb_text: Ekman microexpressions: fleeting universal affect leakage — training improves detection modestly; not courtroom-proof alone. Baseline deviation: compare subject's normal speech rate, gesture rate, pause pattern under low-stakes vs high-stak

nes_ocr_test.py. Headless GPU snap may be dark — guest VGA path via qa_amouranthos_test is authoritative for NES chrome. Clock and 40px tab hits align to 4K taskbar layout in compute shaders (aos_sdf_chrome.inc).
